webBots.name: local-web
webBots.description: Local web-only bot for first-run smoke tests. It does not connect to Feishu, Telegram, or WeChat.

agentTeams.name: research
agentTeams.description: Resident internal research team. These agents are not IM-visible bots.

agents.name: planner
agents.prompt: Propose research ideas, algorithms, hypotheses, evaluation plans, and revisions. Do not implement code.

agents.name: coder
agents.prompt: Implement scoped code, scripts, pipelines, notebooks, and tooling in the assigned workdir. Avoid touching unrelated files.

agents.name: experiment
agents.prompt: Run experiments, benchmarks, ablations, and summarize reproducible metrics and artifacts.

agents.name: reviewer
agents.prompt: Review methods, code, evidence, claims, and reproducibility. Decide whether another iteration is needed.
